items.gloss: rupa (form); visible objects (i.e. color and form)
various; all sorts of; variety of; various colors (colours)

above; up; over; elder (e.g. daughter); top; summit; head (e.g. of a staircase); surface; before; previous; superiority; one's superior; one's elder; on top of that; besides; what's more; not only ... but; upon (further inspection, etc.); based on (and occurring after); matters concerning ...; as concerns ...; since (i.e. "for that reason"); honorable; venerable; place of one's superior (e.g. the throne); emperor; sovereign; shogun; daimyo; noblewoman (esp. the wife of a nobleman)
